verdict_reasoning: JAK3 is a soluble cytoplasmic tyrosine kinase with no transmembrane domain, GPI anchor, or lipidation. Although it associates with the intracellular domains of cytokine receptors (IL-2R, IL-4R, IL-7R, etc.) to transduce interleukin signals, the JAK3 protein body itself remains intracellular and does not reach the outer leaflet of the plasma membrane.
